summary: Mixed reactions with limited feedback; recording quality unclear but some listeners seem pleased
review: The two brief reviews give little detail on the performance or audio, offering only a thank‑you note and a cryptic comment. One reviewer rates it highly (4 stars) while another gives it zero, resulting in an overall mixed impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with vague comments; one positive 4‑star rating and one 0‑star rating lead to a low average and high uncertainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific remarks about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were given.
